title: Clean Energy Superpower Mission areas of research interest
body: "The Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) leads on the government’s mission to Make Britain a Clean Energy Superpower, working in collaboration with other departments.  Researchers, innovators, and stakeholders can use this document to:   align research proposals with government priorities identify high-impact areas for collaboration and investment support dialogue between researchers and policymakers   This document is published in place of a statement of DESNZ areas of research interest.  "
